use_codes.desc: PREFEST IS INDICATED IN WOMEN WHO HAVE A UTERUS FOR THE TREATMENT OF MODERATE TO SEVERE VASOMOTOR SYMPTOMS ASSOCIATED WITH MENOPAUSE; TREATMENT OF VULVAR AND VAGINAL ATROPHY; PREVENTION OF OSTEOPOROSIS

indications.text:
ORTHO-PREFEST™ therapy is indicated in women with an intact uterus for the:
1. Treatment of moderate to severe vasomotor symptoms associated with the menopause.
2. Treatment of vulvar and vaginal atrophy.
3. Prevention of osteoporosis.
Most prospective studies of efficacy for this indication have be...
